name: CMMI v2.0
description: Capability Maturity Model Integration v2.0 is a process improvement framework providing organizations with the essential elements of effective processes. It covers 20 practice areas organized across capability areas (Doing, Managing, Enabling, Improving) with 5 maturity levels for organizational assessment.
license_note: Metadata only. No ISACA/CMMI Institute copyrighted text reproduced. Practice area descriptions are original summaries.

items.title: Requirements Development and Management
items.description: Elicits, analyzes, and establishes customer, product, and product-component requirements. Ensures requirements are managed throughout the project lifecycle including traceability, impact analysis, and change control. Covers both functional and non-functional requirements.
items.purpose: Produce and analyze requirements and ensure alignment between work products and requirements.

items.title: Technical Solution
items.description: Develops, designs, and implements solutions to requirements. Covers selecting product-component solutions, developing detailed designs, and implementing the designs as product components. Includes make-or-buy decisions and technology selection.
items.purpose: Design, develop, and implement solutions to requirements.

items.title: Product Integration
items.description: Assembles the product from product components, ensures that the integrated product functions properly, and delivers the product. Covers integration planning, interface management, and progressive assembly and testing of product components.
items.purpose: Assemble product components and ensure the integrated product functions correctly.

items.title: Verification and Validation
items.description: Ensures that selected work products meet specified requirements (verification) and that the product fulfills its intended use when placed in its intended environment (validation). Covers peer reviews, testing, and acceptance activities.
items.purpose: Ensure products meet requirements and fulfill their intended purpose.

items.title: Peer Reviews
items.description: Identifies and removes defects early in work products through structured reviews by peers. Covers code reviews, design reviews, document reviews, and other forms of peer examination to improve quality and share knowledge.
items.purpose: Identify and remove defects early through structured peer examination.

items.title: Ensuring Quality
items.description: Provides staff and management with objective insight into processes and associated work products. Evaluates processes and work products against applicable process descriptions, standards, and procedures. Addresses noncompliance issues.
items.purpose: Provide objective quality assurance of processes and work products.

items.title: Managing Security and Safety
items.description: Manages security and safety threats to the development environment, the system being built, and the system in operation. Covers security and safety requirements, risk assessment, and mitigation planning for both product and process.
items.purpose: Manage security and safety threats throughout the product lifecycle.

items.title: Configuration Management
items.description: Establishes and maintains the integrity of work products using configuration identification, configuration control, configuration status accounting, and configuration audits. Manages baselines and tracks changes.
items.purpose: Establish and maintain integrity of work products through configuration control.

items.title: Planning
items.description: Establishes and maintains plans that define project activities. Develops the project plan including work breakdown structure, effort and cost estimates, schedule, resource allocation, and risk identification.
items.purpose: Establish and maintain project plans that define activities and guide execution.

items.title: Monitor and Control
items.description: Provides understanding of project progress so that appropriate corrective actions can be taken when the project's performance deviates significantly from the plan. Covers tracking milestones, resources, risks, and commitments.
items.purpose: Monitor project progress and take corrective actions when needed.

items.title: Estimating
items.description: Develops estimates of work product and task attributes. Covers size estimation, effort estimation, schedule estimation, and cost estimation using appropriate methods such as analogy, parametric models, or expert judgment.
items.purpose: Develop reliable estimates for size, effort, schedule, and cost.

items.title: Managing Performance and Measurement
items.description: Uses measurement and analysis to manage performance against objectives. Establishes measurement objectives, specifies measures, collects data, and analyzes results to support decision making and process improvement.
items.purpose: Manage performance through measurement, analysis, and data-driven decision making.

items.title: Process Management
items.description: Establishes and maintains a usable set of organizational process assets and work environment standards. Deploys organizational processes, collects process-related experiences, and improves organizational processes.
items.purpose: Manage organizational processes and process assets for consistent execution.

items.title: Risk and Opportunity Management
items.description: Identifies potential problems before they occur so that risk-handling activities can be planned and invoked as needed. Also identifies opportunities that can be pursued. Covers risk identification, analysis, prioritization, and mitigation planning.
items.purpose: Identify and manage risks and opportunities proactively.

items.title: Work Planning and Management
items.description: Plans, monitors, and controls the work. Integrates planning and monitoring across all activities to provide a coherent, managed approach to work execution. Addresses resource allocation and workload balancing.
items.purpose: Plan and manage work execution across all project activities.

items.title: Supplier Agreement Management
items.description: Manages the acquisition of products and services from suppliers. Covers supplier selection, agreement establishment, supplier performance monitoring, and acceptance of supplier deliverables.
items.purpose: Manage supplier agreements and ensure supplier delivery meets requirements.

items.title: Compliance
items.description: Identifies applicable compliance requirements (regulatory, legal, contractual, and organizational) and ensures that processes and work products comply with those requirements. Addresses compliance tracking and reporting.
items.purpose: Ensure compliance with applicable regulatory, legal, and organizational requirements.

items.title: Causal Analysis and Resolution
items.description: Identifies causes of selected outcomes and takes action to improve process performance. Uses root cause analysis techniques to identify and address the causes of defects, performance problems, and other outcomes that do not meet objectives.
items.purpose: Identify root causes of outcomes and take action to improve performance.

items.title: Decision Analysis and Resolution
items.description: Analyzes possible decisions using a formal evaluation process that evaluates identified alternatives against established criteria. Provides a structured approach to significant decisions to reduce subjective bias.
items.purpose: Apply structured decision-making to significant choices using formal evaluation.

items.title: Governance
items.description: Provides sponsorship, oversight, and governance mechanisms for the organization's process improvement and performance activities. Establishes and maintains governance structures, policies, and oversight mechanisms.
items.purpose: Provide governance and oversight for organizational process improvement.

items.title: Implementation Infrastructure
items.description: Establishes and maintains the infrastructure needed to implement and institutionalize processes. Covers tools, methods, training, and organizational support structures required for consistent process execution.
items.purpose: Establish infrastructure to support consistent process implementation.

items.title: Organizational Process Focus
items.description: Plans, implements, and deploys organizational process improvements based on a thorough understanding of current strengths and weaknesses of the organization's processes and process assets.
items.purpose: Plan and implement organizational process improvements.

items.title: Organizational Process Performance
items.description: Establishes and maintains a quantitative understanding of the performance of selected processes in the organization's set of standard processes. Uses statistical and quantitative techniques to manage process performance.
items.purpose: Establish quantitative understanding of organizational process performance.

items.title: Organizational Training
items.description: Develops the skills and knowledge of people so they can perform their roles effectively and efficiently. Identifies training needs, develops or acquires training, delivers training, and evaluates training effectiveness.
items.purpose: Develop skills and knowledge through systematic organizational training.

items.title: Organizational Process Definition
items.description: Establishes and maintains a usable set of organizational process assets including the organization's set of standard processes and work environment standards. Provides the foundation for consistent process execution.
items.purpose: Define and maintain organizational standard processes and process assets.
